description: Apache Avro is a data serialization system with a compact binary format, JSON schema definitions, and support for schema evolution. The org.apache.avro:avro artifact provides the Java core APIs for defining schemas and reading and writing generic, specific, reflect, and file-encoded Avro data.

Apache Avro is a Java library for working with Avro schemas and compact binary data serialization. It provides the core runtime APIs for schema parsing, binary encoding and decoding, datum readers and writers, and generic, specific, and reflective data models.
